            Source:
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text.Json;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using Ryn.Ipc;

namespace TestApp;

file sealed class StatusCommandsRouter : ICommandRouter
{
    public bool CanRoute(string command) => command is "getStatus";

    public async ValueTask<string> RouteAsync(
        string command, ReadOnlyMemory<byte> args, IServiceProvider services, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        switch (command)
        {
            case "getStatus":
            {
                var __result = global::TestApp.StatusCommands.GetStatus();
                return __ToJson(__result);
            }
            default:
                throw new RynCommandNotFoundException(command);
        }
    }

    private static string __ToJson(string value) =>
        "\"" + value
            .Replace("\\", "\\\\", System.StringComparison.Ordinal)
            .Replace("\"", "\\\"", System.StringComparison.Ordinal)
            .Replace("\n", "\\n", System.StringComparison.Ordinal)
            .Replace("\r", "\\r", System.StringComparison.Ordinal)
            .Replace("\t", "\\t", System.StringComparison.Ordinal)
            .Replace("\0", "\\u0000", System.StringComparison.Ordinal)
            .Replace("\u2028", "\\u2028", System.StringComparison.Ordinal)
            .Replace("\u2029", "\\u2029", System.StringComparison.Ordinal)
        + "\"";
}

public static class StatusCommandsRynExtensions
{
    public static IServiceCollection AddStatusCommands(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<ICommandRouter, StatusCommandsRouter>();
        return services;
    }
}
